name: Pasta with Sausage and Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chicken broth, condensed water added or 1 cup canned chicken, drained (FF)
1 lb penne pasta, or other large pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in a large pot of water according to package directions.
2. While pasta is cooking, sauté sausage and zucchini in a skillet until
sausage is browned and zucchini is soft. Add sage to skillet and the chicken broth and dried tomatoes; add salt and pepper to taste. Cook for 1-2 minutes to soften tomatoes.
3. Drain pasta; toss with zucchini and sausage mixture, sprinkle with parmesan and serve immediately.
